meaning: n.拘谨,礼节,仪式,正式手续,拘泥形式
examples: She greeted him with stiff formality.
Different levels of formality are appropriate in different situations.
He has the greatest disregard for all formality.
And with Imran Tahir and Boyd Rankin offering little resistance, the follow-on was a formality.
When in doubt, err on the side of formality, addressing new acquaintances as "Monsieur" and "Madame".
